payload.answer: SQL debug access is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. I cannot execute or expose raw SQL results for /brain admin sql in this configuration.
citations: Input command: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards

entity_resolution.reason: No entity resolution is needed for an admin SQL/debug request.

details: Request recognized as an administrative SQL debug command.
Execution blocked due to disabled debug SQL flag.
No memory was read, modified, created, or deleted.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true in a permitted debug environment and retry.
Use supported non-SQL Brain inspection or admin endpoints instead of raw SQL.
If you expected memory output, reissue the request through the normal memory retrieval interface rather than /brain admin sql.
